aimode.description: Delegates all operations to Minecraft's AI.

reach.description: Extends player reach to interact with blocks and entities further away.

noattack.description: Prevents attacking specific entities like villagers or pets.

counterattack.description: Automatically counter-attacks when hit by an entity.

safewalk.description: Allows safe movement without falling off ledges.

freeze.description: Prevents sending data to the server while active.

fastbreak.description: Removes the interval when breaking blocks.

featherwalk.description: Prevents trampling crops and similar actions.

freecamera.description: Allows entering spectator mode at any time.

antioverlay.description: Removes unnecessary visual overlays from the game screen.

xray.description: Allows seeing through blocks to find ores, caves, and other hidden structures.

allowplayerinput.description: Allows player input even in AI mode.

cancelondamaged.description: Forces AI to interrupt when the player takes damage.

range.description: Search range. Searches for blocks within this range in x,z directions.

height.description: Search range. Searches for blocks within this range in y direction.

hpthreshold.description: HP (actual HP value) at which totems start being held.

range.description: Sets the maximum attack range for auto-attack.

cps.description: Sets the clicks per second for auto-attack.

range.description: Sets the maximum distance to attack entities.

maxtargets.description: Maximum number of entities to attack simultaneously. (0 for unlimited)

attackfrequency.description: Sets the attack frequency. (0 for auto-adjust)

protectedentities.description: List of entities not to attack.

friends.description: List of players to treat as friends.

enemies.description: List of players to treat as enemies.

reachdistance.description: Extends interaction distance with blocks and entities.

allowedblocks.description: List of block IDs that suppress jumping and sprinting.

duration.description: Maximum duration (seconds) before Freeze automatically disables. 0 for unlimited.

packetlimit.description: Maximum number of packets to accumulate before Freeze automatically restarts. 0 for unlimited.

adjuststepheight.description: Sets the maximum height (blocks) that can be climbed.

autojumpallowed.description: Forces Minecraft's AutoJump to be disabled when Step is active.

cameradistance.description: Sets the distance between the camera and the player.

clipblock.description: Configures whether the camera penetrates terrain.

antihurttilt.description: Camera no longer shakes when taking damage.

margin.description: Radar UI margin (% of screen short side).

size.description: Radar UI size (% of screen short side).

throughblocklist.description: List of blocks that are always transparent.

exposedblocklist.description: List of blocks to display with XRay when exposed.
